import io
import string
import list

fn find_max_idx(xs: List<Int>) -> Int
  mut max_idx = 0
  mut max_val = 0
  match xs.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    max_val = v
  when None
    # empty, shouldn't happen
  end
  mut i = 1
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if v > max_val
        max_val = v
        max_idx = i
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  max_idx
end

fn remove_at(xs: List<Int>, target_idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    if i != target_idx
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        # skip
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      match string.parse_int(s)
      when Some(n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      when None
        # skip non-integer tokens
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end

  let actual_k = if k > nums.len()
    nums.len()
  else
    k
  end

  mut remaining = nums
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut count = 0

  while count < actual_k
    if remaining.len() == 0
      count = actual_k
    else
      let idx = find_max_idx(remaining)
      match remaining.get(idx)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
        remaining = remove_at(remaining, idx)
      when None
        count = actual_k
      end
      count = count + 1
    end
  end

  mut output = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < result.len()
    match result.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        output = "#{v}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  print(output)
  Ok(())
end
